name: lrmem4e4_dclamp995_steps500
hypothesis: the ~0.30 format plateau is an optimization-rate ceiling, not a retention one (exp002 showed more retention didn't help); push both LRs up ~60% (memory 2.5e-4->4e-4, coproduct 1.5e-4->2.5e-4) with a tighter decay_clamp 0.999->0.995 to absorb the extra energy and hold skip=0 — if tokacc rises past 0.30 the bottleneck is the optimizer, if it stays flat the plateau is fundamental (-> Phase 2).
